channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'Built around volcanic materials' — Turkish startup wants to make billion-dollar radar systems near obsolete with cheap spray-in-a-can tech that claims to bring stealth capabilities to low-cost drones
item.description: A Turkish company claims volcanic spray technology reduces drone radar visibility using inexpensive materials and simplified stealth application methods.

item.title: MSI Claw 8 EX AI Plus : la console portable qui inaugure la puce Intel Arc G3 Extreme
item.description: MSI lève le voile sur sa Claw 8 EX AI Plus à la veille du Computex 2026. Premier visage commercial pour la nouvelle puce Intel Arc G3 Extreme, taillée pour les consoles portables.

item.title: MIT's MeMo lets teams swap in a better LLM without retraining — and performance jumps 26%
item.description: Enabling LLMs to acquire new knowledge after training remains a major hurdle for enterprise AI — current solutions are either too expensive, too slow, or constrained by context window limits.MeMo, a framework from researchers at multiple universities, encodes new knowledge into a dedicated smaller memory model that operates separately from the main LLM.The modular architecture works with both open- and closed-source models and sidesteps the complexity of RAG pipelines and full model retraining.Experiments show that MeMo handles complex queries reliably even when retrieval pipelines are noisy. ...

item.title: CNN is the latest media company to sue Perplexity
item.description: CNN is the latest media company hauling Perplexity into court.

item.title: Hands-On With Gemini Spark: I Gave It Access to My Life and It Friend-Zoned My Boyfriend
item.description: Google's new AI agent combed through my emails, documents, and calendar to plan a birthday party and still didn’t clock the person most important to me.

item.title: 'AI adoption has become a game of chance': Employees are being left to navigate AI tools on their own as businesses fail to implement proper training
item.description: Only around half of the workers using AI regularly have had any formal training from their employers.

item.title: If you need identity theft protection for $10 per month, this is the deal for you — Norton LifeLock can help secure you against the #1 crime in America
item.description: Keep your identity safe for $10 per month — Norton LifeLock is 16% off right now

item.title: Acer’s launching a Linux handheld for streaming your PC games
item.description: The Acer Nitro Blaze Link might run on Linux, but it's no Steam Deck. Acer says it's a "streaming-first handheld and companion device," like a PlayStation Portal for your PC. Announced at Computex on Friday, it's launching in Q4 2026 with a 7-inch (1920 x 1200) display, Wi-Fi 6, just 1GB of LPDDR4 RAM, and […]

item.title: MIT scientists make lithium-ion breakthrough that could solve a global battery issue — new low-cost extraction method was inspired by a bathroom renovation project and could reduce reliance on China
item.description: Most gadgets rely on lithium-ion batteries, and scientists have come up with a better way of getting at lithium.

item.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
item.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

item.title: Lidl launches super-cheap solar balcony battery — as home backups become new energy crisis essential
item.description: Lidl's new balcony battery lets you store solar energy to use later or in an emergency, potentially saving you money or keeping the lights on.

item.title: FIFA websites spoofed by hackers ahead of 2026 World Cup, FBI warns
item.description: Dozens of fake FIFA sites are out there, stealing people's data and possibly even money.

item.title: Un trou noir né avant sa galaxie ? Ce « petit point rouge » défie les astronomes
item.description: Ce « petit point rouge » n’est peut-être pas comme les autres découverts par le télescope spatial James-Webb. Les astronomes ont eu la chance de pouvoir l’observer de plus près. Et personne ne s’attendait à ce qu’ils ont découvert : un trou noir supermassif formé avant sa galaxie hôte clairement...

item.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
item.description: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example of “AI psychosis.” Indeed, ClickUp recently cut 22% of its workforce for AI agents, tech layoffs in 2026 are already nearly matching all of 2025, […]

item.title: Samsung TV OLED 77″, Garmin Forerunner 570 et tablette Xiaomi Redmi Pad 2 : les meilleurs bons plans du jour à saisir
item.description: Ce vendredi 29 mai 2026, plusieurs produits très convoités profitent de remises conséquentes chez Carrefour, Alltricks et Xiaomi.

item.title: The Best Robotic Pool Cleaners of 2026: Beatbot, iGarden, Dreame
item.description: Send the pool guy packing. Let one of these robotic buddies maintain your water quality instead.

item.title: Tech companies desperately want to film you doing chores
item.description: This week, an AI training startup called Shift said it would clean New Yorkers' homes for free. It has plans to expand into other cities as well, including London, and looking around my flat, I get the appeal. But there's a catch. There's always a catch. In exchange for the cleaning, Shift wants footage of […]
